name: gavel
description: The judge's hammer for test quality. Minimalism + QA discipline — one test, one verdict, move on.

interface.shortDescription: The judge's hammer for test quality
interface.longDescription: Framework-adaptive QA toolkit that delivers verdicts on test quality. Enforces the QA Ladder and Test Constitution while preserving YAGNI minimalism. One test, one verdict, move on.
defaultPrompt: Use gavel mode for this test task.
Review this test diff for constitution violations.
Diagnose why this test is failing.
